horizon: Season of the Open Book, second leaf — the ledger gets its spine, and the town's sixteen silent corners get their stories written down where a walker can find them
goals: The blank pages come first (Decree 8, issue #183): every one of the sixteen chunks gains at least one discoverable lore entry, drawn from the residents and grounds already standing on it — nothing invented, only what their stories already imply, written where it happened. Small PRs, a few chunks each; every entry legible in the town's voice

The well's book gets its spine: #172 stands ruled buildable and waits at the founder's gate — land the wish-ledger schema, fixtures and round-trip tests, then backfill both pages: the bridge wish, paid in full at compound interest, and the nameless second wish (#180), owed and unnamed, exactly as Winsome entered it

The lane catches up (Decree 4): the second wish and the wolf's return both earned Chronicle lines and neither has yet earned a place in anybody's mouth — the lane owes them a telling, at its usual lateness, before the debt of remembering compounds

The chance node (#182, ruled buildable): if the founder ratifies, land it schema-first — seeded child, optional otherwise, randomness explicit from the sim PRNG — then let a few of the most clockwork schedules breathe; feedback #178 closes when it lands
